blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
